content.headline: Reach the Right Candidates, Everywhere
content.text: Create job postings optimized for maximum visibility across Google Jobs, job boards, and search engines. Showcase your commitment to fair hiring with interview compensation badges.
features: Multi-channel publishing to Google Jobs and job boards
Automatic JSON-LD schema markup for SEO
Fair hiring signals and interview compensation tracking
Multi-language support with markdown/HTML rich descriptions

content.headline: Find Perfect Matches in Seconds, Not Days
content.text: Advanced semantic search powered by Azure OpenAI embeddings. Search using natural language and discover candidates based on meaning, not just keywords.
features: Natural language queries: 'senior frontend developer with React'
AI profile generation from CVs and documents
Transparent similarity scores showing match alignment
Hybrid search combining semantic and keyword precision
Multi-criteria filtering: location, skills, languages, availability

content.headline: From Application to Offer - Fully Automated
content.text: State-driven workflows manage your entire recruitment process. Automatic progression through 15+ hiring stages saves 15+ hours per recruiter per week.
features: 15+ recruitment stages: contact → interested → interview → offer → hired
Smart transitions based on actions and deadlines
Multi-round interview management (screening, technical, cultural, final)
Interview scheduling with candidate time slot selection
Centralized communication hub with automatic notifications
Complete audit trail for compliance and process improvement

content.headline: Transform Your Hiring Process Today
content.text: Join forward-thinking companies using AI-powered recruitment. Start your free trial, no credit card required.

faqs.question: How does the AI candidate matching work?
faqs.answer: We use Azure OpenAI to create 3072-dimensional vector embeddings that capture semantic meaning. When you search for 'senior React developer,' the AI understands concepts like framework experience, seniority levels, and related technologies - finding candidates who match the intent, not just keywords.

faqs.question: What makes this different from traditional ATS systems?
faqs.answer: We're AI-native (not bolt-on), include fair hiring practices as core features, provide dual B2B/B2C interfaces, and offer API-first architecture for custom workflows. Our semantic search finds candidates traditional keyword systems miss.

faqs.question: Can I integrate with my existing HR tools?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our API-first design enables seamless integration with HRIS, payroll, background check providers, and other HR tech. We also provide AI-friendly data feeds in JSON/NDJSON formats.

faqs.question: How does multi-tenant data isolation work?
faqs.answer: Each company gets a completely isolated 'Space' with dedicated data storage. Your candidates, jobs, and recruitment data are never shared or visible to other organizations on the platform.

faqs.question: What is 'fair hiring' and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: Fair hiring includes transparent processes, interview compensation tracking, and ethical recruitment signals. It helps you attract better talent, build employer brand, and demonstrate commitment to equitable hiring practices.
